activities_projects.title: Understanding Democratic Outcomes
activities_projects.objective: Identify the expected outcomes of democracy
steps: Write the five expected outcomes of democracy
Discuss each outcome with examples
Present findings in the classroom

activities_projects.title: Accountable Government Activity
steps: List ways citizens can hold the government accountable
Write examples such as elections and RTI
Explain how accountability improves governance
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises mechanisms of accountability in democracy

activities_projects.title: Responsive Government Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand the concept of responsive government
steps: Discuss situations where government responds to citizens
Write two examples from local governance
Explain why responsiveness is important
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands responsiveness as a democratic outcome

activities_projects.title: Economic Growth Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Examine relationship between democracy and economic development
steps: List factors affecting economic development
Compare democracy and dictatorship in terms of growth
Write a short conclusion
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns how democracy relates to economic growth

activities_projects.title: Inequality Observation
steps: Write examples of inequality in society
Discuss reasons for inequality
Suggest ways democracy can reduce inequality

activities_projects.title: Social Diversity Roleplay
steps: Divide students into groups representing different communities
Discuss how conflicts can be resolved democratically
Present the solution to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns how democracy manages social conflicts

activities_projects.title: Majority vs Minority Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand that democracy is not only rule of majority
steps: Write examples where minority rights are protected
Discuss why majority rule must respect minority views
Explain with real-life examples
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands balance between majority and minority

activities_projects.title: Dignity and Freedom Reflection
activities_projects.objective: Understand dignity and freedom in democracy
steps: Write examples where citizens demand dignity
Discuss rights of women and disadvantaged groups
Explain how democracy protects dignity
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises dignity as a key democratic value

activities_projects.title: Case Study: RTI Example
activities_projects.objective: Understand how citizens use RTI to ensure transparency
steps: Read the example of Nannu using RTI
Identify the problem faced by him
Explain how RTI helped solve the problem
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns importance of transparency in democracy

activities_projects.title: Democracy Evaluation Chart
activities_projects.objective: Assess the strengths and limitations of democracy
steps: Create two columns: strengths and limitations
List points from the chapter
Present the chart to the class
